violations.description: Food-contact surfaces - Design and construction. — --Multiuse food-contact surfaces did not meet design and/or construction requirements. A black garbage bag was being used to cover a pan with dough in the walk in cooler. This must be light colored and food grade.

General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. The top of the mixer is broken. The handle on the upper right door of the stainless steel freezer has tape on it.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. Gasket and the side of the door to the walk in cooler need to be cleaned. The gaskets on the doors to the stainless steel freezer need to be cleaned. The fan in the dish area needs to be cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. The wall in the corner by the three compartment sink needs to be cleaned.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Broken floor tile by the mop sink.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
